{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230517091F6A51DB863EAE10019E"}"},"total":106},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614008207383970622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，女主用星际人理解不了的质朴手段治疗星兽，和忠心耿耿的星兽们一起建设家园，故事框架看着很烂大街的设定，但具体情节很有意思，追平很期待后续发展，评分低了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772777363,"group_id":"7597403748662512702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwf4Ty5TZcYcjVOuyRNFQqI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e4314c7e5191405dabb2b96f00ffc2e1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789870&x-signature=bOxJ8pd3GTpl80ifyhWoxxv6Iuc%3D","user_id":"109575875332206","user_name":"飞跃的小黑猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109575875332206","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597403748662512702","book_info":{"abstract":"【我在星际当兽医】【毛绒绒日常】【从零开始】【轻松爆笑】
毛容容，一个普通的地球社区兽医，因为治好了一只外星大人物的崽，被当作“贡品”送上了星际战。
面对能一口吞掉坦克的S级灭世魔兽，全星际闻风丧胆。
冷面长官：“这是杀戮机器，三分钟内不降伏就轰成渣！”
毛容容看着炸毛的怪兽：“哎呀，这孩子严重缺钙，还长了虫，难怪脾气大。”
于是，在全舰官兵惊恐的目光下，她掏出了逗猫棒和五香牛肉干。
下一秒，灭世魔兽倒地露肚皮，发出拖拉机般的呼噜声。
长官：“？？？这是什么S级精神控制？”
科学院：“报告！检测到地球神秘生化武器‘五香粉’！”
毛容容：“……那个，能给它办个洗澡卡吗？”
科学院专家连夜召开紧急会议：“这一定是地球特有的某种高维精神压制！”
“不，那是逗猫棒。”
“那只猛兽为什么会失去战斗力？”
“因为它被撸爽了。”
后来，星际流传着一个传说：千万别惹那个身上带着牛肉干味女人，她身后站着的，是整个星际怪物图鉴！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a7ecf0bbc9a5f685c6a376502f2f98bd","author":"冇乜野","author_id":"","book_id":"7597403748662512702","book_name":"我在星际修异宠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597404626626822718","read_count":"18838","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"355064"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"151","tags":"科幻末世,星际,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1252f28a2635b28631ce141e349f844a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398229&x-signature=iEKRsH2wrd67IQpAXB372iK4RwI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6046250785","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"212"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230517091F6A51DB863EAE10019E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":30158,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54448,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":867},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611189823777948440","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"终于找到无CP只有星兽跟女主的故事了。
创作题材挺新颖的，具有一定的医疗知识储备。
里面的人物都挺鲜活立体，爱看！~(＾◇^)/"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772120375,"group_id":"7597403748662512702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N97hLBaVmJzWKYq5haU1RoCs9jfiISXNEcZiTjmJhMKj","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4191784537701500","user_name":"爱吃炸鸡的道莫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4191784537701500","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597403748662512702","book_info":{"abstract":"【我在星际当兽医】【毛绒绒日常】【从零开始】【轻松爆笑】
